lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Replaced the deprecated StringUtils.equals with the modern Strings.CS.equals from Apache Commons Lang3.
Removed unused import of Apache Commons Lang3 StringUtils.
Made Entitaet implement the EntitaetreferenzIf interface to support reference semantics.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Added a new field to store database index configuration for the entity.
Removed helper methods for capitalizing and uncapitalizing the entity name, likely replacing them with standard Java string operations or interface methods.
Added a method to return an Entitaetreferenz object representing the entity, fulfilling the interface contract.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added getEntitaetreferenz() method returning a built Entitaetreferenz

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: The class is made to implement the EntitaetreferenzIf interface to enforce a contract or enable polymorphism.
A fetchType field is added to the entity reference to control JPA fetching behavior.
A cascadeType field is added to the entity reference to control JPA cascading behavior.
Added a new boolean field 'fachlichEindeutig' to the Entitaetsfeld class to support business uniqueness constraints.
Added a new boolean field 'alsTabelle' to the Entitaetsfeld class to support table-like representation.
Reformatted field declarations to align variable names and types for better readability.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: public final boolean optional = false; -> public final boolean optional = false;

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the class rename from MaskenEntitaetsfeld to Entitaetsfeld.
Change the type of the parameterFelder field from List<MaskenEntitaetsfeld> to List<Entitaetsfeld> to match the renamed class.
Change the type of the tabellendefinitionParameterFelder field from List<MaskenEntitaetsfeld> to List<Entitaetsfeld> to match the renamed class.

lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Migrate assertion import from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to align with the test framework used in the class.
Replace UI-specific entity classes with generic domain model classes to decouple UI generation from domain definition.

lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Update builder method calls to match the renamed methods in the new domain model classes.
Update the TypeScript import source package to reflect a new organizational namespace.
Replace JUnit 4 static import with JUnit 5 equivalent to align with the test framework migration.
Remove imports for UI model classes that are no longer used in the test after refactoring.

lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Rename the test method to better reflect its purpose of testing the domain model.
Rename the helper method to match the new test focus on domain creation.
Remove UI-specific model construction (Checkbox, Dropdown, etc.) to focus the test solely on the DomainModel serialization.
lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Removed Checkbox, Dropdown, MaskeGridItems, and UiModelReact builder calls; kept only DomainModel and LowCodeModel construction.

lowcode.model/pom.xml.general_idea: Introduce a parent POM to centralize dependency and plugin management.
Remove explicit version for Lombok, deferring to parent management.
Remove explicit version for Gson, deferring to parent management.
Remove explicit version for Commons Lang3, deferring to parent management.
Remove explicit version for Commons IO, deferring to parent management.
Replace junit-jupiter-engine with junit-jupiter-api for test scope.
Add junit-jupiter-engine dependency for test execution.
Remove explicit version for EqualsVerifier, deferring to parent management.
Remove explicit maven-compiler-plugin configuration, deferring to parent.
Remove local properties block as values are likely managed in parent.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added Eclipse-specific project files (.classpath, .project, .settings) and macOS metadata (.DS_Store) to the ignore list to keep the repository clean.
Added Maven build output directory and release configuration file to the ignore list to prevent committing generated or local configuration files.
